title: PublicTypes
description: Schema-only aggregate that keeps every shared public type in one snapshot.

Binary.description:
Binary is a wrapper around Vec<u8> to add base64 de/serialization with serde. It also adds some helper methods to help encode inline.

This is only needed as serde-json-{core,wasm} has a horrible encoding for Vec<u8>. See also <https://github.com/CosmWasm/cosmwasm/blob/main/docs/MESSAGE_TYPES.md>.

Outcome.description: One of the two tradeable outcomes.

Payout.description:
An exact terminal payout vector.

Numerators and the denominator are `Uint128` so JSON never passes these consensus amounts through a floating-point or JavaScript number.

ProtocolVersion.description: Version of the shared prediction-market wire protocol.

Question.description: Immutable identity and timing shared by a market and its oracle question.

close_time.description: Last trading boundary, as Unix seconds.

id.description: Opaque identifier returned or derived under the pinned oracle protocol.

opening_time.description: Earliest oracle answer boundary, as Unix seconds.

text.description: Exact question bytes interpreted as UTF-8 text by cw-reality.
